content:

Selenium is automation testing for small businesses, suitable for small businesses, strongest automation testing.

Recommendations

For small businesses, Choose Cypress free version. For strongest browser testing, pick Playwright. For strongest automation, use Selenium. For friendly option, go with Puppeteer. Combine Cypress free + Playwright strongest browser testing for optimal results.
